nasb.text: Then the cupbearer and the baker for the king of Egypt, who were confined in jail, both had a dream the same night, each man with his own dream and each dream with its own interpretation.

esv.text: And one night they both dreamed—the cupbearer and the baker of the king of Egypt, who were confined in the prison—each his own dream, and each dream with its own interpretation.

cnv.text: 他們二人，就是被關在監裡的埃及王的酒政和膳長，同一夜各作了一個夢，二人的夢各有不同的解釋。

ccb.text: 一天晚上，他们俩都做了梦，他们的梦各有不同的意思。

csbs.text: 他们两人，就是被囚在监狱里的埃及王的司酒长和司膳长，在同一夜都做了梦，各有各的梦，各梦各有其解。
